name: Phishing Email Header Analysis
description: Deep email header authentication analysis workflow. Extracts and validates SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records from email headers to detect spoofing and impersonation attempts. Emails failing authentication checks are blocked at the mail gateway, reported to the abuse contact of the spoofed domain, and logged for threat intelligence. Emails passing all authentication checks are cleared and the alert is closed. Essential for organizations strengthening email authentication posture.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Email Gateway
required_integrations.reason: Block spoofed sender at the mail gateway level

data.title: Email Authentication Alert
data.summary: Triggers on phishing, spoofing, or DMARC failure alerts

data.title: Parse Email Headers
data.summary: Extract SPF, DKIM, DMARC results and key header fields

script.code:
def main(alert):
    headers = alert.get('headers', {})
    auth_results = headers.get('Authentication-Results', headers.get('authentication_results', ''))
    spf_result = 'none'
    dkim_result = 'none'
    dmarc_result = 'none'
    if 'spf=pass' in auth_results.lower():
        spf_result = 'pass'
    elif 'spf=fail' in auth_results.lower() or 'spf=softfail' in auth_results.lower():
        spf_result = 'fail'
    if 'dkim=pass' in auth_results.lower():
        dkim_result = 'pass'
    elif 'dkim=fail' in auth_results.lower():
        dkim_result = 'fail'
    if 'dmarc=pass' in auth_results.lower():
        dmarc_result = 'pass'
    elif 'dmarc=fail' in auth_results.lower():
        dmarc_result = 'fail'
    all_pass = spf_result == 'pass' and dkim_result == 'pass' and dmarc_result == 'pass'
    any_fail = spf_result == 'fail' or dkim_result == 'fail' or dmarc_result == 'fail'
    return {
        'spf': spf_result,
        'dkim': dkim_result,
        'dmarc': dmarc_result,
        'all_pass': all_pass,
        'any_fail': any_fail,
        'return_path': headers.get('Return-Path', ''),
        'received_from': headers.get('Received', ''),
        'reply_to': headers.get('Reply-To', ''),
        'from': headers.get('From', alert.get('sender', ''))
    }

data.title: AI Header Analysis
data.summary: AI evaluates header anomalies, routing path, and spoofing indicators

config.custom_instructions: Focus on email header authentication failures (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), mismatched Return-Path vs From, suspicious Received hops, and Reply-To discrepancies

data.title: Auth Failure Detected?
data.summary: Did any email authentication check (SPF/DKIM/DMARC) fail?

data.title: Block Sender at Gateway
data.summary: Block the spoofed sender at the email gateway

config.message: Blocking sender {{$.trigger.alert.sender}} at email gateway — SPF: {{$.nodes.code-1.result.spf}}, DKIM: {{$.nodes.code-1.result.dkim}}, DMARC: {{$.nodes.code-1.result.dmarc}}

data.title: Report to Abuse Contact
data.summary: Send abuse report to the spoofed domain's abuse contact

data.title: Notify SOC
data.summary: Alert SOC team with header analysis results

data.title: Close Alert — Auth Passed
data.summary: All email authentication checks passed, close the alert

config.note: Email passed all authentication checks — SPF: pass, DKIM: pass, DMARC: pass. No spoofing detected.

data.title: End — Spoofing Blocked
data.summary: Spoofed sender blocked, abuse reported, SOC notified

config.summary: Email spoofing confirmed via header authentication failures. Sender blocked at gateway, abuse report sent, SOC notified.
Email passed SPF, DKIM, and DMARC authentication. No spoofing indicators found.
